# Zephyr

> Zephyr is a mobile app that helps anxious flyers stay calm during flights using an offline AI assistant. It works without internet, provides real-time emotional support, and keeps all data on-device.

Zephyr is designed for people with aviophobia, frequent travelers with anxiety, and first-time flyers. The core differentiator is that the AI companion runs entirely offline — no network connection required, no data leaves the device.

## Product

- Mobile app (iOS, iPhone 15–17)
- Offline AI chat assistant powered by an on-device LLM
- Structured Calm Guidance: step-by-step calming flows triggered by user anxiety signals
- Real-time contextual reassurance during flight
- Aviation knowledge base integrated into the model (e.g. turbulence facts, normal flight sounds)
- Warm, non-clinical tone — not a therapy app, not a medical device

Example user inputs the app is designed to handle:
- "I'm scared of turbulence"
- "Is this noise normal?"
- "I feel panic coming"

## Pricing

- Subscription: $9–49/month
- One-time flight pass
- 7-day travel pass

## Privacy & Legal

- Company: Qwerty12 Inc
- All AI inference runs on-device. No conversation data is transmitted or stored externally.
- Analytics tools in use: Google Analytics, Mixpanel, PostHog
- Data retention: 2 months
- Privacy contact: privacy@zephyr.help
- Policies available at zephyr.help: Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, App Privacy Policy

## Website

- zephyr.help
- Pages: Landing, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Support

## Contact

- Privacy: privacy@zephyr.help
